headline: Assessing EMCOR Group (EME) Valuation After FTSE All World Index Inclusion
summary: Index inclusion puts EMCOR Group (EME) on more investors’ radar EMCOR Group (EME) has been added to the FTSE All-World Index (USD), an event that can attract attention from index tracking funds and prompt portfolio rebalancing around the stock. See our latest analysis for EMCOR Group. At a share price of $732.89, EMCOR Group has seen a 90 day share price return of 16.87% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 98.02%. This performance may be influenced by the FTSE All World Index inclusion,...
